name: Black Velvet
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a 10-inch tube pan and sprinkle half a cup of almonds on the bottom.
3. In a mixer bowl, combine the remaining ingredients. Beat for 4 minutes.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and almonds, then pour into the prepared pan.
5. Bake for 60 to 70 minutes or until set.
6. Allow cooling for 15 minutes before removing from the pan.
7. Optional: Serve with a topping of whipped cream if desired.
